channel.title: News from Major Indian Metropolitan Cities Today | The Hindu
channel.description: Explore the latest news and updates from various cities across India on The Hindu. Stay informed about local events, developments, and significant happenings in different cities, including Hyderabad, Chennai, Mumbai, Delhi, and more.

image.title: News from Major Indian Metropolitan Cities Today | The Hindu

item.title: He taught us to go the extra distance in capturing a frame: Sunny Joseph on Shaji N.Karun
item.description: Veteran cinematographers like him instilled the courage in the people who followed them to take a few risks and go the extra distance in capturing a frame.

item.title: Female Tribal Students to participate in long march for not receiving accommodation in govt hostels
item.description: Student Federation of India (SFI) held several discussions with the tribal department for the accommodation of these girls in government hostels.

item.title: Maharashtra Congress alleges irregularities in MHT-CET State exams, writes to CM to seek a probe
item.description: Maharashtra Congress State president Harshvardhan Sapkal wrote a letter to Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis demanding investigation in the alleged irregularities in the State-level common entrance examination.

item.title: NHAI, KMRL mull ways to prevent clash of alignment for elevated highway, viaduct
